name: Howland Park
description:
Four side-by-side courts in a fenced enclosure. Howland was completely resurfaced at the beginning of the 2024 season with an Acrytech top coat. 

There is a large play scape for children next to the courts. It is being completely rebuilt as of 8 June 2025.
open_play_schedule: There are no set hours. Players organize on Team Reach. There is no paddle holder or culture of showing up as a single and putting your paddle in the rack to play in.

name: Hunter Park
description: Hunter Park is a place to play pickleball in Newport, RI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Little Compton
description: Little Compton is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Little Compton, RI. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The court is free.

name: Naval Station Newport Chaffee Fitness Center
description: Naval Station Newport Chaffee Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newport, RI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Free and open to all DoD ID card holders with MWR privileges.

name: Newport Pickleball Club
description: Rhode Islands best indoor courts! Air conditioned facility with an amazing full restaurant and bar.  Offering court rentals, open play, top rated coaching lessons, and a great Pickleball atmosphere!  Come check us out we are open all week long!
fees: Fee required — Individual Membership - $70/month, Couples Membership - $130/month, Family Membership - 170/month, Junior Membership - $40/month, For Seniors, Teachers, First Responders & Veterans - $5

name: Vernon Park
description: 4 permanent tennis courts with permanent pickle ball lines painted as well.
